title: AXOverlayService
description: Service class for managing overlay components and modal dialogs.

types.title: AXOverlayService

props.name: activeOverlays
props.description: Array of currently active overlay references.

types.description: Service for creating, managing, and controlling overlay components such as modals, tooltips, and popovers.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new overlay with the specified component and options.

methods.name: open
methods.description: Opens an overlay component with the specified configuration.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes a specific overlay by its reference.

methods.name: getActiveOverlays
methods.description: Returns all currently active overlay references.

methods.name: hasActiveOverlays
methods.description: Checks if there are any active overlays.

methods.name: setDefaultOptions
methods.description: Sets default options for all overlays created by this service.

methods.name: onOverlayOpen
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when an overlay is opened.

methods.name: onOverlayClose
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when an overlay is closed.

methods.name: onOverlayError
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when overlay operations fail.

methods.name: onOverlayPositionChange
methods.description: Registers a callback to be called when overlay position changes.
